title: Light-Scan Visor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Light-Scan_Visor.png|thumb|right|200px|[[Canderous Ordo]] wearing a Light-Scan Visor]]
'''Light-Scan Visors''' were invaluable tools that increased visual acuity by analyzing light on several frequencies above those of normal light.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-07-XX -->[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
